structured_payload_candidate.title: Static pressure setpoint reset T&R parameters
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Static pressure setpoint shall be reset using T&R logic with parameters: SP0=120 Pa, SPmin=25 Pa, SPmax=Max_DSP, Td=10 min, T=2 min, I=2, R=zone static pressure reset requests, SPtrim=-12 Pa, SPres=+15 Pa, SPres-max=+32 Pa.

Table 5.16.1.2 Trim & Respond Variables
Variable  Value
Device  Supply fan
SP0 120 Pa (0.5 in. of water)
SPmin  25 Pa (0.1 in. of water)
SPmax  Max_DSP (see Section 3.2.1.1 )
Td 10 minutes
T 2 minutes
I 2
R Zone static pressure reset requests
SPtrim  –12 Pa ( –0.05 in. of water)
SPres  15 Pa (+0.06 in. of water)
SPres -max 32 Pa (+0.13 in. of water)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied/Setup SAT setpoint reset with OAT
structured_payload_candidate.summary: During Occupied/Setup, reset SAT from Min_ClgSAT at OAT ≥ OAT_Max, proportionally up to T-max at OAT ≤ OAT_Min; T-max reset via T&R between Min_ClgSAT and Max_ClgSAT.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Occupied or Setup mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset SAT setpoint from Min_ClgSAT when OAT ≥ OAT_Max, proportionally up to T-max when OAT ≤ OAT_Min; T-max reset using T&R
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: During Occupied Mode  and Setup Mode , setpoint  shall be r eset from Min_ClgSAT when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Max and above, proportionally up to T -max when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Min and below.

evidence_quote: During Occupied Mode  and Setup Mode , setpoint  shall be r eset from Min_ClgSAT when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Max and above, proportionally up to T -max when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Min and below.
evidence_text: During Occupied Mode  and Setup Mode , setpoint  shall be r eset from Min_ClgSAT when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Max and above, proportionally up to T -max when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Min and below.
judge_reason: Operational rule for SAT setpoint reset with OAT

structured_payload_candidate.title: AbsMinOA* calculation for Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.summary: AbsMinOA* = sum of Zone-Abs-OA-min for occupied zones, limited to AbsMinOA.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Title 24 ventilation; zones in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: AbsMinOA* = min(AbsMinOA, Σ Zone-Abs-OA-min for occupied zones)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: AbsMinOA * is the sum of Zone -Abs-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occupied Mode  but shall be no larger than the absolute minimum outdoor airflow AbsMinOA.

evidence_quote: AbsMinOA * is the sum of Zone -Abs-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occupied Mode  but shall be no larger than the absolute minimum outdoor airflow AbsMinOA.
evidence_text: AbsMinOA * is the sum of Zone -Abs-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occupied Mode  but shall be no larger than the absolute minimum outdoor airflow AbsMinOA.
judge_reason: Operational calculation for AbsMinOA*

structured_payload_candidate.title: DesMinOA* calculation for Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.summary: DesMinOA* = sum of Zone-Des-OA-min for occupied zones, limited to DesMinOA.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Title 24 ventilation; zones in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: DesMinOA* = min(DesMinOA, Σ Zone-Des-OA-min for occupied zones)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: DesMinOA* is the sum of Zone -Des-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occup ied Mode  but shall be no larger than the design minimum outdoor airflow DesMinOA.

evidence_quote: DesMinOA* is the sum of Zone -Des-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occup ied Mode  but shall be no larger than the design minimum outdoor airflow DesMinOA.
evidence_text: DesMinOA* is the sum of Zone -Des-OA-min for all zones in all Zone Group s that are in Occup ied Mode  but shall be no larger than the design minimum outdoor airflow DesMinOA.
judge_reason: Operational calculation for DesMinOA*

structured_payload_candidate.title: AbsDPsp* and DesDPsp* calculations for Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: AbsDPsp* = AbsMinDP * (AbsMinOA* / AbsMinOA)^2; DesDPsp* = DesMinDP * (DesMinOA* / DesMinOA)^2.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Separate min OA damper with DP control, Title 24
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate AbsDPsp* and DesDPsp* as shown
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
AbsDPsp *= AbsMinDP [AbsMinOA * AbsMinOA]2
DesDPsp *= DesMinDP [DesMinOA * DesMinOA]2

evidence_quote:
AbsDPsp *= AbsMinDP [AbsMinOA * AbsMinOA]2
DesDPsp *= DesMinDP [DesMinOA * DesMinOA]2
evidence_text:
AbsDPsp *= AbsMinDP [AbsMinOA * AbsMinOA]2
DesDPsp *= DesMinDP [DesMinOA * DesMinOA]2
judge_reason: Operational calculation for DP setpoints

structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: MinDPsp reset from AbsDPsp* at 50% CO2 signal to DesDPsp* at 100% signal.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset MinDPsp linearly based on highest zone CO2 loop signal
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The minimum outdoor air DP setpoint  MinDPsp  shall be reset based on the highest zone CO 2 control -loop signal from AbsDPsp* at 50% signal to DesDPsp* at 100% signal.

evidence_quote: The minimum outdoor air DP setpoint  MinDPsp  shall be reset based on the highest zone CO 2 control -loop signal from AbsDPsp* at 50% signal to DesDPsp* at 100% signal.
evidence_text: The minimum outdoor air DP setpoint  MinDPsp  shall be reset based on the highest zone CO 2 control -loop signal from AbsDPsp* at 50% signal to DesDPsp* at 100% signal.
judge_reason: Operational rule for MinDPsp reset with CO2

structured_payload_candidate.title: Open minimum outdoor air damper when fan ON and Occupied and MinDPsp>0
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Open damper when supply fan proven ON, Occupied, MinDPsp>0; otherwise close.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply air fan proven ON, system Occupied, MinDPsp > 0
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Open minimum outdoor air damper; otherwise close
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Open minimum outdoor air damper when the supply air fan is pro ven ON and the system is in Occupied Mode  and MinDPsp is greater than zero. Damper shall be closed otherwise.

evidence_quote: Open minimum outdoor air damper when the supply air fan is pro ven ON and the system is in Occupied Mode  and MinDPsp is greater than zero. Damper shall be closed otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum OA control disable conditions for return fans (DP)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Disable when not Occupied or (economizer high limit not exceeded AND (min OA damper closed or return damper < MRA-P - 10%)) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: No longer Occupied OR (economizer high limit not exceeded AND (min OA damper closed OR return damper < MRA-P - 10%)) for 10 min
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Disable minimum outdoor air control
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be disabled when  the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode , or both of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17  are not exceeded.
ii. The minimum outdoor air damper is closed or the return air damper position is 10% below MRA -P.

evidence_quote:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be disabled when  the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode , or both of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17  are not exceeded.
ii. The minimum outdoor air damper is closed or the return air damper position is 10% below MRA -P.
evidence_text:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be disabled when  the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode , or both of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17  are not exceeded.
ii. The minimum outdoor air damper is closed or the return air damper position is 10% below MRA -P.
judge_reason: Operational rule for min OA control disable

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum OA control enable conditions for return fans (DP)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable when Occupied and (economizer high limit exceeded OR (min OA damper open and return damper > MRA-P)) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Unit with return fan; Occupied; economizer high limit exceeded OR (min OA damper open AND return damper position > MRA-P) for 10 min
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable minimum outdoor air control
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be enabled when  the unit is in Occupied Mode  and either of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded.
ii. When the minimum outdoor air damper is open and  the return air damper position is greater than MRA -P.

evidence_quote:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be enabled when  the unit is in Occupied Mode  and either of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded.
ii. When the minimum outdoor air damper is open and  the return air damper position is greater than MRA -P.
evidence_text:
Minimum outdoor air control shall be enabled when  the unit is in Occupied Mode  and either of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes:
i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded.
ii. When the minimum outdoor air damper is open and  the return air damper position is greater than MRA -P.
judge_reason: Operational rule for min OA control enable

structured_payload_candidate.title: Return fan MRA-P calculation
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: MRA-P scales from 95% at 100% fan speed to 20% at min speed; if not calculate, set to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply fan proven on, Occupied, MinDPsp>0
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Calculate MRA-P as described; default to 100% if unavailable
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the supply air fan is proven on and the system is in Occup ied Mode and MinDPsp is greater than zero, the system shall calculate MRA -P.  The value of MRA -P shall scale from 95% when supply fan speed is at 100% design speed proportionally down to 20% when the fan is at minimum speed.  When MRA -P is not being calcul ated for any reason, it shall be set to 100%.

evidence_quote: When the supply air fan is proven on and the system is in Occup ied Mode and MinDPsp is greater than zero, the system shall calculate MRA -P.  The value of MRA -P shall scale from 95% when supply fan speed is at 100% design speed proportionally down to 20% when the fan is at minimum speed.  When MRA -P is not being calcul ated for any reason, it shall be set to 100%.
evidence_text: When the supply air fan is proven on and the system is in Occup ied Mode and MinDPsp is greater than zero, the system shall calculate MRA -P.  The value of MRA -P shall scale from 95% when supply fan speed is at 100% design speed proportionally down to 20% when the fan is at minimum speed.  When MRA -P is not being calcul ated for any reason, it shall be set to 100%.
judge_reason: Operational rule for MRA-P calculation

structured_payload_candidate.title: Return fan: Disabled sequence restores economizer damper
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control with Separate Damper and DP Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When min OA control disabled: fully open economizer damper, set MaxRA-P=100%, control per SAT loop.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Minimum outdoor air control disabled
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fully open economizer damper, set MaxRA-P to 100%, control per SAT loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When minimum outdoor air control is disabled :
i. Economizer outdoor air damper shall be fully opened .
ii. MaxRA -P shall be set to 100% .
iii. Economizer and return air damper positions shall be controlled by the SAT control loop per Section 5.16.2 .

evidence_quote:
When minimum outdoor air control is disabled :
i. Economizer outdoor air damper shall be fully opened .
ii. MaxRA -P shall be set to 100% .
iii. Economizer and return air damper positions shall be controlled by the SAT control loop per Section 5.16.2 .
evidence_text:
When minimum outdoor air control is disabled :
i. Economizer outdoor air damper shall be fully opened .
ii. MaxRA -P shall be set to 100% .
iii. Economizer and return air damper positions shall be controlled by the SAT control loop per Section 5.16.2 .
judge_reason: Operational rule for disabled min OA control sequence

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Relief dampers enabled when supply fan proven ON; disabled otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable relief dampers; disable otherwise

evidence_quote: Relief dampers  shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON, and disabled otherwise.
evidence_text: Relief dampers  shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON, and disabled otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Relief dampers building pressure control
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control of Actuated Relief Dampers without Fans
structured_payload_candidate.summary: P-only loop modulates dampers to maintain 12 Pa building pressure; closed when disabled.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Relief dampers enabled
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: P-only loop to maintain 12 Pa; close when disabled
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When enabled, use a P -only control loop to modulate relief dampers to maintain 12 Pa ( 0.05 in. of water)  building static pressure. Close damper when disabled.

evidence_quote: When enabled, use a P -only control loop to modulate relief dampers to maintain 12 Pa ( 0.05 in. of water)  building static pressure. Close damper when disabled.
evidence_text: When enabled, use a P -only control loop to modulate relief dampers to maintain 12 Pa ( 0.05 in. of water)  building static pressure. Close damper when disabled.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Building static pressure time averaging for relief fans
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Time-average building pressure with sliding 5-min window, 15-s sampling; use highest averaged sensor in pressure zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Relief fan control active
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Time-average and use highest sensor for control
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5 -minute window and 15 second sampling rate (to dampen fluctuations). The averaged va lue shall be that displayed and used for control.
a. Where multiple building pressure sensors are used, each shall be time -averaged and the highest of the averaged values for sensors within a pressure zone shall be used for control.

evidence_quote:
Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5 -minute window and 15 second sampling rate (to dampen fluctuations). The averaged va lue shall be that displayed and used for control.
a. Where multiple building pressure sensors are used, each shall be time -averaged and the highest of the averaged values for sensors within a pressure zone shall be used for control.
evidence_text:
Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5 -minute window and 15 second sampling rate (to dampen fluctuations). The averaged va lue shall be that displayed and used for control.
a. Where multiple building pressure sensors are used, each shall be time -averaged and the highest of the averaged values for sensors within a pressure zone shall be used for control.
judge_reason: Operational rule for building pressure averaging

structured_payload_candidate.title: Relief fan staging logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage 0: open dampers >5% loop, close at 0% for 5 min. Stage Up: loop >min+15% starts timer, every 7 min start next fan. Stage Down: loop <min speed starts timer, every 5 min shut off lag fan.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Relief system enabled
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Execute staging as described
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Stage 0 (barometric relief ). When relief system is enabled , and the control loop output is above 5%, open the motorized dampers to all relief fans serving the relief system group that are enabled; close the dampers when the loop output drops to 0% for 5 minutes.
b. Stage Up . When control loop is above minimum speed plus 15%, start stage -up timer.  Each time the timer  reaches 7 minutes, start the next relief fan (and open the associated damper) in the relief system group , per staging order , and reset the timer  to 0. The timer  is reset to 0 and frozen if control loop is below minimum speed plus 15%.
c. Stage Down . When PID loop is below minimum speed, start stage -down timer.  Each time the timer  reaches 5 minutes, shut off lag fan per staging order and reset the timer  to 0. The ti mer is reset to 0 and frozen if PID loop rises above minimum speed or all fans are OFF. If all fans are OFF, go to Stage 0 (all dampers open and all fans OFF).

evidence_quote: 5.16.9.7.  Fan speed signal to all operating fans in the relief system group shall be the same and shall be equal
anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
evidence_text: 5.16.9.7.  Fan speed signal to all operating fans in the relief system group shall be the same and shall be equal
judge_reason: Operational rule for relief fan staging

structured_payload_candidate.summary: P-only loop to maintain 12 Pa building pressure; 0-50% output modulates exhaust dampers 0-100%; 51-100% resets return fan discharge static pressure setpoint from RFDSPmin to RFDSPmax.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Supply and return fans proven ON, min OA damper open
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate exhaust dampers and return fan DP setpoint as per loop output
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
A single P -only control loop  for each pressure zone  shall modulate  to maintain the building pressure at a setpoint of 12 Pa (0.05 in. of water) with an outpu t ranging from 0% to 100%.  The loop shall be enabled when the supply and return fans for any unit within the pressure zone are proven ON and the minimum outdoor air damper is open.  The exhaust dampers shall be closed with loop output set to zero otherwis e.  All exhaust damper and return fan static pressure setpoints for units in an associated pressure zone shall be sequenced based on building pressure control loop output signal, as shown in Figure 5.16.10.5. setpointsetpoint
a. From 0% to 50%, the building pressure control loop shall modulate the exhaust dampers from 0% to 100% open.
b. From 51% to 100%, the building pressure control loop shall reset the return -fan discharge static pressure setpoint  from RFDSPmin at 50% loop output to RFDSPmax at 100% of loop output. See Section 3.2.1.4  for RFDSPmin and RFDSPmax.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze protection stage 1
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT < 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 min, send heating plant requests, override OA damper to min, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥6°C (42°F); disable when SAT >7°C (45°F) for 5 min.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT drops below 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send heating plant requests, override OA damper to min, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥6°C (42°F); disable at >7°C (45°F) for 5 min
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot -water plant requests , override the outdoor air damper to the minimum posit ion, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.

evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot -water plant requests , override the outdoor air damper to the minimum posit ion, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
evidence_text: If the supply air temperature drops below 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot -water plant requests , override the outdoor air damper to the minimum posit ion, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
judge_reason: Operational rule for freeze protection stage 1

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze protection stage 2
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT < 3.3°C (38°F) for 5 min, fully close economizer and min OA dampers for 1 hr, Level 3 alarm; after 1 hr, resume min OA and return to stage 1.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT drops below 3.3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close dampers for 1 hr, set alarm, resume min OA after 1 hr and return to stage 1
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 3.3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both the economizer damper and the minimum outdoor air damper for 1 hour and set a Level 3 alarm noting that minimum ventilation was interrupted. After 1 hour, the unit shall  resume minimum outdoor air ventilation and enter the previous stage of freeze protection (see Section 5.16.12.1 ).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze protection stage 3
structured_payload_candidate.summary: On freeze-stat signal or SAT<3.3°C (38°F) for 15 min or <1°C (34°F) for 5 min: shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil 100%, energize CHW pump, send heating plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C (80°F), Level 2 alarm; requires operator reset if triggered by low temperature sensor.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Freeze-stat signal or SAT<3.3°C (38°F) for 15 min or <1°C (34°F) for 5 min
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil 100%, energize CHW pump, send heating plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C (80°F), Level 2 alarm; operator reset if sensor triggered
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Upon signal from the freeze -stat (if installed ), or if supply air temperature drops below 3.3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes or below 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fan(s), close outdoor air damper, open the cooling -coil valve  to 100%, and energize the CHW pump system. Also send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot -water plant requests , modulate the heating coil to maintain the higher of the supply air temperature or the mixed air temperature at 27°C (80°F), and set a Level 2 alarm indicating the unit is shut down by freeze protection.
a. If a freeze -protection shutdown is triggered by a low air temperature sensor reading, it shall remain in effect until it is reset by a software switc h from the operator’s workstation. (If a freeze -stat with a physical reset switch is used instead, there shall be no software reset switch .)
